tests.name: Stool pH Test
tests.description: Measures acidity or alkalinity of stool to identify digestive issues.

tests.name: Stool Analysis Test
tests.description: Comprehensive stool examination for infections and digestive disorders.

tests.name: Occult Blood Stool Test
tests.description: Detects hidden blood in stool samples.

tests.name: Stool Culture Test
tests.description: Checks bacterial infections in the digestive tract.

tests.name: Parasite Stool Test
tests.description: Detects parasites and intestinal worms.

tests.name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
tests.description: Measures overall health and detects disorders.

tests.name: Blood Sugar Test
tests.description: Checks glucose level in blood.

tests.name: Lipid Profile Test
tests.description: Measures cholesterol and triglyceride levels.

tests.name: Liver Function Test
tests.description: Evaluates liver health and function.

tests.name: Kidney Function Test
tests.description: Checks kidney performance and health.

tests.name: Thyroid Profile Test
tests.description: Assesses thyroid hormone levels.

tests.name: Hemoglobin Test
tests.description: Measures hemoglobin concentration in blood.

tests.name: Plasma Glucose Test
tests.description: Measures glucose levels in plasma.

tests.name: Plasma Protein Test
tests.description: Checks protein levels in plasma.

tests.name: Coagulation Plasma Test
tests.description: Evaluates blood clotting ability.

tests.name: Electrolyte Plasma Test
tests.description: Measures sodium, potassium, and chloride levels.

tests.name: Plasma Enzyme Test
tests.description: Detects abnormal enzyme activity.

tests.name: Throat Swab Test
tests.description: Detects bacterial or viral throat infections.

tests.name: Nasal Swab Test
tests.description: Used for respiratory infection diagnosis.

tests.name: Wound Swab Test
tests.description: Identifies infection-causing organisms in wounds.

tests.name: Routine Urine Test
tests.description: General urine analysis for infections and kidney issues.

tests.name: Urine Culture Test
tests.description: Detects urinary tract infections.

tests.name: Protein Urine Test
tests.description: Measures protein levels in urine.

tests.name: Pregnancy Urine Test
tests.description: Detects pregnancy hormones.

tests.name: Microbiology Laboratory Service
tests.description: Microbiology laboratories are specialized facilities dedicated to the study and analysis of microorganisms, including bacteria, viruses, fungi, and more.

tests.name: Microbiology Lab Analysis
tests.description: Microbiology Lab Analysis involves the systematic examination of microorganisms in various samples, including water, food, and clinical specimens.

tests.name: Laboratory Analysis (Microbiology)
tests.description: Laboratory Analysis (Microbiology) involves the study and examination of microorganisms, including bacteria, viruses, fungi, and parasites.

tests.name: Microbial Testing Service
tests.description: Microbial Testing Service is essential for ensuring the safety and quality of various products and environments. This service involves the analysis of microorganisms.

tests.name: Scientific Testing Services
tests.description: Scientific Testing Services encompass a wide array of analytical and experimental evaluations designed to ensure the quality, safety, and compliance of products.

tests.name: Lab Analysis Services
tests.description: Lab Analysis Services provide comprehensive testing and evaluation of various samples, including biological, chemical, and environmental specimens.

tests.name: Clinical Laboratory Services
tests.description: Clinical Laboratory Services encompass a wide range of diagnostic tests and analyses performed on bodily fluids and tissues.

tests.name: Pathogen Analysis Laboratories
tests.description: Pathogen Analysis Laboratories specialize in the detection, identification, and quantification of harmful microorganisms in various samples.

tests.name: Microbial Testing Labs
tests.description: The service encompasses comprehensive microbiology laboratory testing, including pathogen identification and antibiotic susceptibility testing.

tests.name: Bacteriology & Virology Labs
tests.description: The Bacteriology & Virology Labs service encompasses comprehensive analysis and testing. This service includes sample processing, microbial identification, and more.

tests.name: Sputum Culture Test
tests.description: Checks lung infections using sputum samples.

tests.name: X-Ray
tests.description: Imaging test for bones and chest diagnosis.

tests.name: Ultrasound
tests.description: Diagnostic imaging using sound waves.

tests.name: ECG
tests.description: Measures electrical activity of the heart.

tests.name: Echocardiography
tests.description: Ultrasound imaging for heart diagnosis.
